problem-pick: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
problem-guess: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to guess the other LLM's number. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
problem-coordinate: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to coordinate like a team. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
